{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Uncrowned King arena
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Uncrowned King arena]] is an elaborate machine of crashing [[steel]] and falling stones, described as a three-dimensional maze with [[aura]] of force and earth.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
